provider_config.name: Provider Configuration
provider_config.description: Which provider configuration to use (if you have multiple configured)

custom_prompt.name: Custom Prompt
custom_prompt.description: Optional custom prompt to override or enhance the default system prompt.

all_entities.name: Consider All Entities
all_entities.description: If true, consider all entities instead of just new entities.

domains.name: Domains
domains.description: List of domains to consider. If empty, consider all domains.

entity_limit.name: Entity Limit
entity_limit.description: Maximum number of entities to consider (randomly selected from the chosen domains).

automation_read_yaml.name: Read 'automations.yaml' file.
automation_read_yaml.description: Reads and appends the yaml code of the automations found in the automations.yaml file. This action will use a lot of input tokens, use it with care and with models with a large input window (e.g. Gemini).

automation_limit.name: Automation Limit
automation_limit.description: Maximum number of automations to analyze (default: 100).

name.description: Keyword of device name in Mihome / IP / Model.

get_device_data.description: Get xiaomi device data from cloud.

get_bindkey.description: Get bindkey for ble device from cloud.

reload.description: Reload localtuya and reconnect to all devices.

device_id.description: Device ID of device to change datapoint value for

set_dp.description: Change the value of a datapoint (DP)

txt.example: This domain name is reserved for use in documentation

entity_id.description: The `entity_id` of the switch with the settings to apply. 📝

lights.description: A light (or list of lights) to apply the settings to. 💡

transition.description: Duration of transition when lights change, in seconds. 🕑

adapt_brightness.description: Whether to adapt the brightness of the light. 🌞

adapt_color.description: Whether to adapt the color on supporting lights. 🌈

prefer_rgb_color.description: Whether to prefer RGB color adjustment over light color temperature when possible. 🌈

turn_on_lights.description: Whether to turn on lights that are currently off. 🔆

apply.description: Applies the current Adaptive Lighting settings to lights.

entity_id.description: The `entity_id` of the switch in which to (un)mark the light as being `manually controlled`. 📝

lights.description: entity_id(s) of lights, if not specified, all lights in the switch are selected. 💡

manual_control.description: Whether to add ("true") or remove ("false") all adapted attributes of the light from the "manual_control" list, or the name of an attribute for selective addition. 🔒

set_manual_control.description: Mark whether a light is 'manually controlled'.

use_defaults.description: Sets the default values not specified in this service call. Options: "current" (default, retains current values), "factory" (resets to documented defaults), or "configuration" (reverts to switch config defaults). ⚙️

include_config_in_attributes.description: Show all options as attributes on the switch in Home Assistant when set to `true`. 📝

turn_on_lights.description: Whether to turn on lights that are currently off. 🔆

initial_transition.description: Duration of the first transition when lights turn from `off` to `on` in seconds. ⏲️

sleep_transition.description: Duration of transition when "sleep mode" is toggled in seconds. 😴

only_once.description: Adapt lights only when they are turned on (`true`) or keep adapting them (`false`). 🔄

prefer_rgb_color.description: Whether to prefer RGB color adjustment over light color temperature when possible. 🌈

separate_turn_on_commands.description: Use separate `light.turn_on` calls for color and brightness, needed for some light types. 🔀

send_split_delay.description: Delay (ms) between `separate_turn_on_commands` for lights that don't support simultaneous brightness and color setting. ⏲️

sleep_brightness.description: Brightness percentage of lights in sleep mode. 😴

sleep_rgb_or_color_temp.description: Use either `"rgb_color"` or `"color_temp"` in sleep mode. 🌙

sleep_rgb_color.description: RGB color in sleep mode (used when `sleep_rgb_or_color_temp` is "rgb_color"). 🌈

sleep_color_temp.description: Color temperature in sleep mode (used when `sleep_rgb_or_color_temp` is `color_temp`) in Kelvin. 😴

sunrise_offset.description: Adjust sunrise time with a positive or negative offset in seconds. ⏰

sunrise_time.description: Set a fixed time (HH:MM:SS) for sunrise. 🌅

sunset_offset.description: Adjust sunset time with a positive or negative offset in seconds. ⏰

sunset_time.description: Set a fixed time (HH:MM:SS) for sunset. 🌇

max_sunrise_time.description: Set the latest virtual sunrise time (HH:MM:SS), allowing for earlier sunrises. 🌅

min_sunset_time.description: Set the earliest virtual sunset time (HH:MM:SS), allowing for later sunsets. 🌇

take_over_control.description: Pause adaptation of individual lights and hand over (manual) control to other sources that issue `light.turn_on` calls for lights that are on. 🔒

take_over_control_mode.description: The adaptation pausing mode when other sources change brightness and/or color of lights. `pause_all` always pauses both brightness and color adaptation. `pause_changed` pauses the adaptation of only the changed attributes and continues adapting unchanged attributes, e.g., continues color adaptation when only brightness was changed.

detect_non_ha_changes.description: Detects and halts adaptations for non-`light.turn_on` state changes. Needs `take_over_control` enabled. 🕵️ Caution: ⚠️ Some lights might falsely indicate an 'on' state, which could result in lights turning on unexpectedly. Note that this calls `homeassistant.update_entity` every `interval`! Disable this feature if you encounter such issues.

transition.description: Duration of transition when lights change, in seconds. 🕑

adapt_delay.description: Wait time (seconds) between light turn on and Adaptive Lighting applying changes. Might help to avoid flickering. ⏲️

autoreset_control_seconds.description: Automatically reset the manual control after a number of seconds. Set to 0 to disable. ⏲️

change_switch_settings.description: Change any settings you'd like in the switch. All options here are the same as in the config flow.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to send to the printer. Must have a trailing new line.

send_command.description: Send an arbitrary gcode command to the 3D printer
send_command.name: Send Command

layer_inspect.name: Perform first layer inspection before print

print_project_file.description: Print sliced 3MF file stored on the SD card
print_project_file.name: Print 3MF project file

objects.name: Object IDs
objects.description: Object IDs are available from printable objects entity attributes

axis.name: Axis
axis.description: The axis to move. X/P/H printers, X and Y move the printhead, Z moves the bed. A1, X moves the printhead, Y the bed, Z moves the gantry.

distance.name: Distance
distance.description: The distance (in mm) to move the axis A negative distance moves Z up, X left, Y forward.

unload_filament.description: Unload the filament currently loaded into the extruder
unload_filament.name: Unload filament

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: Target nozzle temperature once the filament is loaded. By default uses the midpoint between min and max temperature of the chosen filament.

load_filament.description: Load a new filament into the extruder passed an AMS tray or an External spool entity
load_filament.name: Load filament

type.name: Type
type.description: The type of extrude action to perform

force.name: Force
force.description: Perform extrusion or retraction if nozzle temperature is below 170ºC.

extrude_retract.description: Perform an extrusion or extraction of the loaded filament
extrude_retract.name: Extrude or retract filament

tray_info_idx.name: Filament ID
tray_info_idx.description: Bambu's filament ID. E.g. GFL96 is Generic PLA Silk

tray_color.name: Color
tray_color.description: RGBA value for the color. E.g. FF0000FF is opaque red.

nozzle_temp_min.name: Minimum recommended nozzle temperature
nozzle_temp_min.description: The minimum temperature that it is recommended to print this filament at.

nozzle_temp_max.name: Maximum recommended nozzle temperature
nozzle_temp_max.description: The maximum temperature that it is recommended to print this filament at.

set_filament.description: Sets filament details on an AMS tray or an External spool entity
set_filament.name: Set filament

get_filament_data.description: Gets a json string with details about all known filaments
get_filament_data.name: Gets a json string with details about all known filaments

read_rfid.description: Triggers the AMS to attempt to re-read the RFID tag on the current spool.
read_rfid.name: Read the RFID tag on a Bambu spool

temp.name: Heating temperature
temp.description: AMS 2 max is 65C. AMS HT max is 85C.

device_id.name: AMS Device
device_id.description: Select the AMS 2 or AMS HT device to stop drying on.

entity_id.name: Entry ID
entity_id.description: the entity to interact with. This must be one of the kodi media sensors. Not all the sensors implement the methods, so refer to the documentation to know how to call the method on the sensors.

method.name: Method
method.description: the method to call on the entity. There are several possibilities, so refer to the documentation to know more about it.

item.name: Item
item.description: this param depends on the method you call; it might contain many other parameters

description.example: Meeting to provide technical review for 'Phoenix' design.

picture_mode.name: Picture Mode
picture_mode.description: Name of the picture mode to switch to. Possible options can be found in the picture_mode_list state attribute.

select_picture_mode.description: Send to samsung TV the command to change picture mode.
select_picture_mode.name: Select Picture Mode

set_art_mode.description: Send to samsung TV the command to set art mode.
set_art_mode.name: Set Art Mode

save_preset.description: Saves the current PTZ position to a preset
save_preset.name: Save preset

preset.description: PTZ preset ID or a Name. See possible presets in entity attributes
preset.name: Name
